description: As an Information Security Analyst at Buttercup Games investigating performance degradation on the e-commerce storefront, identify aggressive web scrapers using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, credentials: admin / SplunkAdmin1!). Create a report named 'Aggressive_Scraper_Report' that aggregates web log data by client IP address, calculating both the total number of requests and the total data volume (bytes) for each IP, filtered to show only those with more than 200 requests. Additionally, create a dashboard named 'Bot_Activity_Dashboard' containing at least two panels that visualize web traffic patterns or scraper activity.
